positive: A minimalist, vibrant abstract geometric arrangement featuring interconnected celestial motifs—stars, moons, and constellations—rendered in thick, stylized linework. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, designed for immediate visibility on apparel. Color palette must use a limited, high-contrast scheme of deep sapphire blue, burnt gold, and clean off-white. The style is graphic, inspired by mid-century modern poster art and sacred geometry, ensuring crisp, solid color fields and clean, scalable silhouettes suitable for screen printing. Use negative space effectively to define the edges of the motifs. Studio shot, vector art quality, 8k detail.
